ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "variables" TEXT /* List of variables in the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the dataset file on the server */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset file in bytes */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last modified */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dataset */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dataset is public or private */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dataset is archived */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels for easy categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the variable belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the variable */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the variable */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the variable */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the variable */,
  "missing_values" INTEGER /* Number of missing values in the variable */,
  "is_categorical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the variable is categorical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the algorithm was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the algorithm */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the algorithm is active and available for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the analysis */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used for the analysis */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis ended */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the analysis failed */,
  "resources_used" TEXT /* Resources used during the analysis (e.g., CPU, memory) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Indicates if the analysis is shared with other users */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs the analysis is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset or analysis */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset or analysis was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is deleted */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_base" (
  "kb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge base entry */,
  "kb_type" TEXT /* Type of the knowledge base entry (e.g., dataset, algorithm) */,
  "kb_text" TEXT /* Text of the knowledge base entry */,
  "kb_date" TEXT /* Date the knowledge base entry was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the knowledge base entry */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the knowledge base entry is public */,
  "related_datasets" TEXT /* List of related dataset IDs */,
  "related_algorithms" TEXT /* List of related algorithm IDs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_variables" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  "result_text" TEXT /* Text of the analysis results */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis results were generated */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Metrics of the analysis results (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "visualizations" TEXT /* Paths to generated visualizations */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the analysis results are deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)
